name: Open Radar Sweep
css: .darma-loader-open-radar-sweep{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:72px;height:72px;border:2px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#10b981) 42%,transparent);border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#10b981) 16%,transparent) 0 2px,transparent 3px),radial-gradient(circle,transparent 45%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#10b981) 15%,transparent) 46% 48%,transparent 49%);overflow:hidden}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:conic-gradient(from 0deg,color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#10b981) 70%,transparent),transparent 42%);animation:darma-loader-open-radar-sweep-spin var(--loader-speed,1.8s) linear infinite}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep i{position:absolute;width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--loader-color,#10b981);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--loader-color,#10b981)}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep i:nth-child(1){left:21px;top:24px}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep i:nth-child(2){left:48px;top:36px}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep i:nth-child(3){left:32px;top:52px}@keyframes darma-loader-open-radar-sweep-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
